name: ms-sentinel-graph
title: Microsoft Sentinel Graph
summary: Sentinel Graph MCP tool collection enables natural-language analysis of entities relationships to uncover security insights through graph exploration. This collection is in testing mode.
description: Sentinel Graph MCP tool collection enables natural-language analysis of entities relationships to uncover security insights through graph exploration. This collection is in testing mode. Official version is consolidated into the Microsoft Sentinel MCP server (data-exploration). Official support to this version is ending 06-15-2026. Learn more: https://aka.ms/mcp/sentinel-graph

useCases.name: Exposure-to-Critical Asset Path Analysis
useCases.description: Build security agents that discover and enumerate realistic attack paths from exposed or vulnerable entry points—such as internet-facing virtual machines or compromised identities—to critical assets like databases, Key Vaults, or sensitive storage accounts, using walkable paths to focus on reachable risks.

useCases.name: Compromised Entity Blast Radius Analysis
useCases.description: Build security agents that assess the potential impact of a compromised user, managed identity, or virtual machine by traversing connected permissions, identities, and resources to determine how far an attacker could move and which assets could be affected.

useCases.name: Exposure Perimeter Mapping
useCases.description: Build security agents that identify the exposure perimeter of a resource, identity, or service by finding all incoming access paths from external or less-trusted entities, highlighting how attackers could reach the target and where defensive controls can be applied.

useCases.name: Critical Asset Discovery
useCases.description: Build security agents that scan for critical assets matching specific vulnerability or exposure criteria—such as internet-facing servers running outdated operating systems, storage accounts lacking encryption, or databases with sensitive data classification - to identify and prioritize remediation of high-risk infrastructure.

useCases.name: Privileged Access and Connection Analysis
useCases.description: Build security agents that map privileged access pathways by discovering which identities hold admin roles to critical systems, which service principals can escalate privileges, and which users can delegate permissions to sensitive resources, enabling better visibility into permission hierarchies and access control risks.

sentinelGraphOAuth.description: Authenticate with Microsoft Sentinel using OAuth2 authorization code flow with PKCE support.
